title: Steward + CIViC-community outreach; reviewer recruitment
context: The project currently has no committed steward or named reviewers (License/Compliance and Scientific). The M0 exit is blocked until a License/Compliance reviewer is named. Outreach to the CIViC community and relevant academic/advocacy groups is needed to recruit stewards and domain reviewers. This is a human coordination task.
objective: Conduct initial outreach to CIViC community members, cancer bioinformatics groups, and potential stewards. Recruit a named License/Compliance reviewer (hard M0 exit requirement) and identify candidate Scientific reviewers. Log outreach contacts and responses.
acceptanceCriteria: Outreach to ≥3 candidate stewards or community groups is logged with contact, date, and response.
A named License/Compliance reviewer is recruited or the blocker is escalated per PLAN.md fallback.
At least one candidate Scientific reviewer is identified.
Outreach log is committed as docs/partner-outreach-log.md.
output: docs/partner-outreach-log.md recording outreach contacts, responses, and recruiter status for the License/Compliance and Scientific reviewer seats, committed via PR.
